tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Imperative Sentences.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Imperative Sentences का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Close the door. Help me. Drink plenty of water. Stay away from fire. Let's go for a walk.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) about your day using Imperative Sentences.
tasks.hindiPrompt: अपने दिन के बारे में Imperative Sentences का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Open the door. Close the window. Come here. Go there. Sit on the chair.

tasks.prompt: Translate the following into English: "सीधे खड़े हो।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "Stay away from fire yesterday."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue between two people using Imperative Sentences.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Imperative Sentences का उपयोग करते हुए दो व्यक्तियों के बीच 4 पंक्तियों का संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Write your name. Listen carefully. Look at the board. Stop.
